postalAddress.value: Waitaki Electorate Office: 127 Thames Street, Oamaru 9400
postalAddress.notes: National Party contact page lists Oamaru office address (also lists Wanaka office: Spencer House Mall, 12/31 Dunmore Street, Wanaka 9305).

aiInvolvement.notes: Quick scan of available public profile/contact pages did not mention AI or artificial intelligence.

sourcesChecked.notes: Found electorate office street address (Oamaru) and an additional office (Wanaka).
